MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.cns_core
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/cns_core.py (374 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: CNS Core — The Central Nervous System (V4.0 Original)
======================================================
The original unified module containing the core event-driven
CNS architecture before it was split into separate organs.

This module provides backward compatibility for imports that
reference

CLASSES:
- EventType(Enum): V4.0: Event types for the async CNS life loop.
- CNSEvent: V4.0: A single event in the CNS event queue.
- SynapticField: The Global Shared State (The Field).
There is no Input -> Output, only writes to
  Methods: def update_physics(self, physics: dict)
  Methods: def add_thought(self, thought: dict)
  Methods: def get_snapshot(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_dark_matter_w(self) -> float
- CosmosCNS: The Central Nervous System (Class 5 Symbiote).
V4.0: Async Event-Driven Architec
  Methods: def initialize_organs(self)
  Methods: def push_event(self, event_type: EventType, payload: dict=None)
  Methods: def start_life(self, dry_run: bool=False, dry_run_ticks: int=30)
  Methods: async def process_user_input(self, user_input: str, user_physics: dict)
